name: MovingDate
description: Customer wants to book, change, cancel, or check a specific moving date for their Virgin Media service relocation — they have already decided to move and need to manage the date itself, not ask general questions about the moving process.

sampleUtterances.utterance: I need to {movingDateAction} my moving date
Can I {movingDateAction} the date for my home move?
{movingDateAction} my move for {dateSlot}
I want to {movingDateAction} when my services get moved
My moving date has changed — I need to {movingDateAction} it to {dateSlot}
Can I {movingDateAction} my relocation date?
I need to {movingDateAction} my move — the new date is {dateSlot}
{movingDateAction} the date for moving my broadband
My house move has been delayed and I need to {movingDateAction} my installation date
I was supposed to move on {dateSlot} but that's changed now
Can you {movingDateAction} the moving date you have on file for me?
I want to {movingDateAction} my move date to {dateSlot} please
The completion date on my house has moved — I need to update my moving date
I no longer need to move on {dateSlot} — can you {movingDateAction} it?
Is my move still booked for {dateSlot} ?
Can you confirm what moving date you have for my account?
I haven't received confirmation of my moving date
My move date is now {dateSlot}
I need to bring my moving date forward
Can I push my move back by a week?
{movingDateAction} moving date
I exchanged contracts today and my move date is {dateSlot} — can you {movingDateAction} that in?
